title: Senior Plant Manager at Exide Industries

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Exide Industries
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Exide Industries in Pune offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Exide Industries:
Exide Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Exide Industries!
